name: James N. Mattis
summary: Former Secretary of Defense who resigned in 2018 and later criticized Trump for divisiveness and abuse of constitutional rights in a 2020 statement.

keyStatements.quote: Donald Trump is the first president in my lifetime who does not try to unite the American people — does not even pretend to try. Instead he tries to divide us.
keyStatements.context: Statement after George Floyd protests and Lafayette Square incident

keyStatements.quote: We must reject and hold accountable those in office who would make a mockery of our Constitution.
I watched [the militarized response to protests] angry and appalled.
keyStatements.context: Response to Trump's use of military force against peaceful protesters

timeline.event: Published scathing criticism in The Atlantic
timeline.significance: Broke silence to criticize Trump's divisiveness
Broke silence to condemn divisiveness and abuses

credibility.background: Four-star Marine general with 43 years of service, served in Persian Gulf War, Afghanistan, and Iraq

oppositionReasons: Said Trump does not try to unite the American people
Said Trump made a mockery of the Constitution
Condemned use of military force against protesters
endorsement: Did not endorse candidate but implied opposition to Trump

sources.title: James Mattis Denounces President Trump, Describes Him as a Threat to the Constitution
